prompt:
A highly detailed black-and-white optical illusion portrait illustration of a confident athletic man, created entirely from flowing wavy stripes. The artwork uses alternating black and white curved lines that seamlessly form both the subject and the background, producing a mesmerizing Op Art effect. High contrast monochrome design, clean vector style, ultra-sharp edges, minimalistic yet intricate linework, poster-quality graphic artwork, centered composition, vertical portrait orientation (4:6).
